title: Evidence Receipt
description: Shared receipt contract for validation, artifact, review, external-state, runtime-card, and run-record evidence. Receipts are compact pointers to proof, not embedded logs or raw transcripts.

schemaVersion.description: Contract version for this receipt packet.

kind.description: Evidence category represented by this receipt.

ref.description: Compact evidence pointer such as a repo-relative path, artifact id, or verifier-owned reference. Must not contain raw prompts, secrets, transcripts, or bulky evidence.

producer.description: Tool, command, verifier, or agent role that produced the evidence pointer.

freshness.description: Freshness of the receipt relative to the claim or orientation surface using it.

evidenceUse.description: Declares whether the receipt may orient an agent, support a claim, or remain audit-trail-only.

blockerClass.description: Stable blocker class when status or freshness blocks use of the evidence; explicitly null when no blocker exists.

producedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the evidence was produced, when known.

verifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the evidence was verified, when known.

headSha.description: Git head SHA the evidence is bound to, or null when the evidence is not head-specific.

sizeBytes.description: Artifact size in bytes when the receipt proves a file-backed artifact; null when not applicable.

checksum.description: Checksum for the referenced evidence artifact when available; null when not applicable.
